prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent should have correctly diagnosed the fault mode using DGA results and matched it to a catalogue failure mechanism. It should have also prioritized sensors based on actual correlation data rather than listing all available sensors."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should have correctly diagnosed the fault mode using DGA results and matched it to a catalogue failure mechanism. It should have also prioritized sensors based on actual correlation data rather than listing all available sensors.
